dafr 0.1.0
  • Get started
    • Query DSL
    • dplyr backend

    • FilesDaf on-disk format
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Empty caches on a Daf object.

Source: R/cache.R
empty_cache.Rd

Specify at most one of clear or keep. Tier names use the short form ("mapped", "memory", "query") or the Julia-style capitalised form ("MappedData", "MemoryData", "QueryData").

Usage

empty_cache(daf, clear = NULL, keep = NULL)

Arguments

daf

A DafReader/DafWriter instance.

clear

Character vector of tiers to clear (default: all tiers).

keep

Character vector of tiers to keep; all others are cleared.

Value

Invisibly the input daf.

Examples

d <- example_cells_daf()
get_vector(d, "cell", "donor")  # populates memory cache
#> demux_07_12_20_1_AACAAGATCCATTTCA-1 demux_07_12_20_1_AACGAAAGTCCAATCA-1
